Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated creatinine and proteinuria, suggesting significant renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, bilirubin, ketones) further support renal dysfunction, possibly nephrotic syndrome or acute/chronic kidney disease. Blood glucose is normal, but HbA1c is low, possibly due to anemia or recent hypoglycemia. Electrolytes are mostly normal except for mild hyperchloremia. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further workup for underlying renal pathology.
